title: DarkDeath
description: Allows any player to kill themselves on servers or single player
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkDeath


Kill your player character in game to save yourself from tricky situations | View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)
 

Playing modded Minecraft or playing on servers can sometimes leave us with a problem where a potion effect like levitation or slowfall gets stuck on our character or our characters get stuck in a particular block, or any other problem where we cannot control our characters and there are no admins around to help.  This simple mod enables you to activate a trigger command to simply kill your player character and resume back to normal playing. Use a mod like DarkInventory alongside this mod to enable keep inventory.

 

Use command /trigger darkdeath  and your character will be instantly killed. 


 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
